category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Kin as a tool that checks whether project.pbxproj files are correct.
source_facts.description says Kin provides sane PBXProj files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kin; official GitHub README title uses KIN/Kin.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe PBXProj validation for Xcode projects using ANTLR.
